memoryArtifacts.headline: Vladislav II de Bohême
memoryArtifacts.description:
Vladislav II Premysl (environ 1110 – 18 janvier 1174) est prince puis roi de Bohême de 1140 à 1172.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Vladislav II Přemyslovec於大約1110年出生時，他的父親Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN42歲，母親Richenza von Berg20歲。他於大約1140年與Gertrude von Babenberg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1174年1月18日在薩辛阿赤 格勞豪梅拉納享年65歲，埋葬在捷克斯洛伐克普拉哈。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vladislav II Přemyslovec于大约1110年出生时，他的父亲Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN42岁，母亲Richenza von Berg20岁。他于大约1140年与Gertrude von Babenberg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1174年1月18日在薩辛阿赤 格勞豪梅拉納享年65岁，埋葬在捷克斯洛伐克普拉哈。

meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Vladislav II Přemyslovec was born about 1110, his father, Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN, was 42 and his mother, Richenza von Berg, was 20. He married Gertrude von Babenberg about 1140. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 January 1174, in Meerane, Amt Glauchau, Saxony, at the age of 65, and was buried in Prague, Czechoslovakia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vladislav II Přemyslovec est né environ 1110, son père, Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Richenza von Berg, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude von Babenberg environ 1140. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1174, à Meerane, Amt Glauchau, Sachsen, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Prague, Tchécoslovaquie.

historicEvents.description: Die urkundliche Ersterwähnung von Meerane steht im Zusammenhang mit dem Tod des böhmischen Königs Wladislaw II., der im Jahr 1174 nach nur viermonatigem Aufenthalt auf der Burg Mare (Mer) starb.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vladislav II Přemyslovec um 1110 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN 42 und seine Mutter Richenza von Berg 20. Er hat um 1140 Gertrude von Babenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Januar 1174 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Meerane, Amt Glauchau, Sachsen und wurde in Prag, Tschechoslowakei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vladislav II Přemyslovec è nato il circa 1110, il suo padre, Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Richenza von Berg, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude von Babenberg circa 1140. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 gennaio 1174, nel Meerane, Amt Glauchau, Sachsen, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Praga, Cecoslovacchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Vladislav II Přemyslovecが約1110年に生まれた時，父Vladislaus I VON BÖHMENは42歳，母Richenza von Bergは20歳であった。約1140年にGertrude von Babenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年1月18日にサチセンアムト グラウチャウメエランで65歳で死去し，チェコスロバキアプラハにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Vladislav II Přemyslovec(이)가 대략 1110년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Richenza von Berg(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1140년 Gertrude von Babenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년 1월 18일 작센 아트 글로차우 메랜에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 체코 슬로바키아 프라하에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vladislav II Přemyslovec nasceu aproximadamente 1110, seu pai, Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Richenza von Berg, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude von Babenberg aproximadamente 1140. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1174, em Meerane, Amt Glauchau, Sachsen, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Praha, Tchecoslováquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vladislav II Přemyslovec родился около 1110 г., его отцу по имени Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Richenza von Berg, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude von Babenberg около 1140 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 января 1174 г. в местности миран, амт глаучао, сачсен в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Прага, Чехословакия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vladislav II Přemyslovec nació aproximadamente 1110, su papá, Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Richenza von Berg, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Gertrude von Babenberg aproximadamente 1140. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de enero de 1174, en Meerane, Amt Glauchau, Sachsen, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Praga, Checoslovaquia.
